'''Deksi Fivvl''' was an old [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] that served as [[Naz Felyood]]'s longtime engineer aboard the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship ''[[Jynni's Virtue]]'' during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. Fivvl also served as the ship's part-time historian, since one of his primary hobbies was studying the history of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Much of his information was shoddy at best, but Deksi produced enough valid information to keep the crew from getting into trouble. Much of Deksi's information about the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], however, was later rendered inaccurate by the [[Jedi historian]]s of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. After landing on Korriban, Deksi and the crew found themselves beset by [[Korriban zombie]]s, when [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Felyood tried to take the [[Heart of Graush]]. In an effort to make sure the zombies didn't get the ship, [[Babbnod Luroon]] set off the self-destruct mechanism, killing the remaining crew as well as the zombies.
